choices.name: chcCollusionBetweenSupplierandInternalStaff
choices.choiceText: Collusion Between Supplier and Internal Staff

value.stringValue: Collusion Between Supplier and Internal Staff

choices.name: chcManuallyCreate
choices.choiceText: Address Not Listed - Manually Create Address

choices.name: Co_Funding_Contribution_Amount_Paid_From_Grant_Instead_of_Landlord_Third_Party
choices.choiceText: Co-Funding Contribution Amount Paid From Grant Instead of Landlord/Third Party

value.stringValue: Co-Funding Contribution Amount Paid From Grant Instead of Landlord/Third Party

choices.name: Collusion_Between_Retrofit_Co_Ordinator_and_Homeowner_Landlord
choices.choiceText: Collusion Between Retrofit Co-Ordinator and Homeowner/Landlord

value.stringValue: Collusion Between Retrofit Co-Ordinator and Homeowner/Landlord

choices.name: Collusion_Between_Scheme_Administrator_Internal_Staff_and_Homeowner_Landlord

value.stringValue: Collusion Between Scheme Administrator (Internal Staff) and Homeowner/Landlord

choices.choiceText: Collusion Between Supplier and Internal Staff

choices.name: Error
choices.choiceText: Error: Losses arising from unintentional events processing error and official / administrations errors

choices.name: Fraud
choices.choiceText: Fraud: Intentionally making a false representation or failing to disclose relevant information, or the abuse of position, to make a gain or cause

choices.name: IncorrectAmountSenttotheSupplier
choices.choiceText: Incorrect Amount Sent to the Supplier

value.stringValue: Incorrect Amount Sent to the Supplier

choices.name: Invoiced_by_Both_Installer_and_Retrofit_Co_Ordinator
choices.choiceText: Invoiced by Both Installer and Retrofit Co-Ordinator

choices.name: Mandate_Fraud_Unrelated_to_Scheme_Properties
choices.choiceText: Mandate Fraud - Unrelated to Scheme Properties

choices.name: Measure_Already_Exists_in_the_Property
choices.choiceText: Measure Already Exists in the Property

value.stringValue: Measure Already Exists in the Property

choices.name: Measure_Not_Compliant_With_Standards_Cannot_Be_Lodged
choices.choiceText: Measure Not Compliant With Standards/Cannot Be Lodged

value.stringValue: Measure Not Compliant With Standards/Cannot Be Lodged

choices.name: MoneySenttotheIncorrectSupplier
choices.choiceText: Money Sent to the Incorrect Supplier

value.stringValue: Money Sent to the Incorrect Supplier

choices.name: Non_Compliance
choices.choiceText: Non-Compliance: Failure or refusal to act in accordance with a set of rules, regulations, or standards

choices.name: Supplier_Invoice_Proposal_Charging_for_Additional_Cancelled_Work
choices.choiceText: Supplier Invoice/Proposal - Charging for Additional/Cancelled Work

value.stringValue: Supplier Invoice/Proposal - Charging for Additional/Cancelled Work

Flow.description: DESNZ - Creates a Fraud and Error record for monthly and ad hoc reporting

formulas.name: fla_ActorOtherHTMLCheck
formulas.expression:
IF( AND( FIND("<", {!f_ao}) > 0, FIND(">", {!f_ao}, FIND("<", {!f_ao})) > FIND("<", {!f_ao}), OR( CONTAINS({!f_ao},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_ao},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_ao},"

"), CONTAINS({!f_ao},"

formulas.name: flaMonthPriorStartDate
formulas.expression: DATE( IF(MONTH(TODAY()) = 1, YEAR(TODAY()) - 1, YEAR(TODAY())), IF(MONTH(TODAY()) = 1, 12, MONTH(TODAY()) - 1), 1 )

Flow.label: DESNZ - Report Fraud and Error

recordLookups.name: Get_Fraud_and_Error_Record_Type_Id
recordLookups.label: Get Fraud and Error Record Type Id

recordLookups.name: Get_Internally_Generated_Fraud_and_Error_Record_Type_Id
recordLookups.label: Get Internally Generated Fraud and Error Record Type Id

fields.name: Closure_Details_Header
fields.fieldText:
Create Fraud or Error Record

{!Get_Award.Name}

fields.name: Edit_Closure_Heading
fields.fieldText:
Edit Fraud or Error Record

{!rcdUpdateFraud.LA_Identifier__c}

fields.name: Closure_Details_Body
fields.fieldText:
Closure, Outcome and Resolution Details


Please enter details of the closure outcomes and resolution  of the fraud, error or non-compliance case related to this award.


Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required. Please ensure all required fields are completed before submitting the form.

fields.name: Caseworker_Name
fields.helpText: Enter the name/ email address of the person responsible for the mitigating action

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Outstanding_Debt_Value
fields.helpText: Financial value outstanding to recover

fields.name: Recommendations_and_Comments
fields.helpText: Please add any further recommendations or comments, including any process or policy changes

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Resolution_Action_Taken
fields.helpText: Describe the mitigation action(s) taken to address/resolve the fraud or error.

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Closed_Corrected_Heading
fields.fieldText:
Closed Corrected Details


Please populate these details if a previous case which you closed has now been amended/corrected.

fields.name: Closed_Case_Corrected_Date
fields.helpText: Populate this date if a previous case which you closed has now been amended/corrected. This should be the date that the case was corrected.

fields.name: Reason_for_Correction
fields.helpText: Please select the reasons for correction if a previous case which you closed has now been amended/corrected. This is a multi selection picklist.

fields.name: Reason_for_Correction_Other
fields.helpText: If not listed above drop down describe the reason for correction

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Confirmation_Message_Create
fields.fieldText:
Fraud Case Ref: {!flaLaIdentifier}


Your {!Case_Type} case has been created successfully and has been added to the funding award: {!Get_Award.Name}.

fields.name: Confirmation_Message_Edit
fields.fieldText:
Fraud Case Ref: {!rcdUpdateFraud.LA_Identifier__c}


Your {!Case_Type} case has been updated successfully for funding award.

fields.name: Confirmation_message_Update
fields.fieldText:
Fraud Case Ref: {!flaLaIdentifier}


Your {!Case_Type} case has been created successfully and has been added to the funding award.

fields.name: CreateNewReports_text
fields.fieldText: Would you like to create any new Fraud and Error reports for this month?

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Confirmation_message_Update
fields.fieldText:
Fraud Case Ref: {!rcdUpdateFraud.LA_Identifier__c}


Your {!Case_Type} case has been updated successfully for the funding award.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_CreateNewReports_text
fields.fieldText: Would you like to create any new Fraud and Error reports for this month?

fields.name: Create_Actions_Header
fields.fieldText:
Add Actions to Fraud and Error Record

{!Get_Award.Name}

fields.name: Existing_Installer_Supplier_Details_Display
fields.fieldText:
This installer/supplier already exists in the system


{!rcdUpdateFraud.Installer_Supplier_Account_Name__c}


Trustmark Business Licence Number: {!rcdUpdateFraud.Trustmark_Business_License_Number__c}

fields.name: Existing_Installer_Manual
fields.fieldText:
This manually entered installer/supplier already exists in the system


{!rcdUpdateFraud.Installer_Supplier_Manually_Entered__c}

fields.name: Confirm_this_is_the_existing_installer_supplier_to_use
fields.fieldText: Confirm this is the existing installer/supplier to use

fields.name: Existing_Address_Details_Display
fields.fieldText:
This address with this UPRN {!rcdUpdateFraud.Property_Address__r.Address_UPRN__c} already exists in the system


{!rcdUpdateFraud.Property_Address__r.Street}

﻿{!rcdUpdateFraud.Property_Address__r.City}

{!rcdUpdateFraud.Property_Address__r.State}

{!rcdUpdateFraud.Property_Address__r.PostalCode}

fields.name: Existing_Address_Manually_Entered
fields.fieldText:
This manually entered property address already exists in the system


{!rcdUpdateFraud.Property_Address_Manually_Entered__c}

fields.name: Confirm_existing_address_to_use
fields.fieldText: Confirm this is the existing address to use

fields.name: Fraud_Error_Manual_Display
fields.fieldText:
Parent Record: {!recordObject} {!Get_Award.Name}

Creation Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDate}

Created by: {!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName}


Please specify the source of the internal case (e.g., a site visit or desktop audit).

fields.name: Fraud_and_Error_Summary_Header
fields.fieldText:
Create Fraud or Error Record

{!Get_Award.Name}

fields.name: Edit_Heading
fields.fieldText:
Edit Fraud or Error Record

{!rcdUpdateFraud.LA_Identifier__c}

fields.name: Fraud_Error_Summary_Text
fields.fieldText:
Summary of Details Being Reported


You should use this area to provide details of Fraud and Error being reported. Select the summary of risk from the list provided and the category of risk areas drop down will then be dependent on this selection.


Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required. Please ensure all required fields are completed before submitting the form.

fields.name: Summary
fields.helpText: Please provide a brief summary of the fraud and error being reported. 255 Characters

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Description
fields.helpText: Please provide a description of the fraud and error being reported. 10,000 characters

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Category_of_Risk_Areas_Other
fields.helpText: If not listed above drop down, provide a summary of the risk area

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Source
fields.helpText: How the suspected fraud, error or non-compliance identified, so source of finding it.

fields.name: Source_Other
fields.helpText: Please describe how the fraud or error was identified - if not on the drop down

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Fraud_FileUpload
fields.fieldText:
Upload supporting information to a Fraud or Error record


To include any relevant supporting information or evidence relating to the reported issue, click the link below or drag and drop files to upload them to the report.

fields.name: Document_Body
fields.fieldText:
Your document needs to be :


  • no more than 10 MG in size
  • in PDF, .jpeg, .png or . doc format

You can upload multiple documents.

value.stringValue: click the link below or drag and drop files to upload

fields.name: NoAccountsFound
fields.fieldText:
No Installer / Supplier Accounts Found


Manually enter the Installer/Supplier name and Trustmark Business Licence Number if you cannot find them from the lists provided

fields.name: Installer_Supplier_Details
fields.helpText: Enter the installer/supplier name if cannot find from the list provided

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Installer_Supplier_Header
fields.fieldText:
Installer / Supplier Name 


Only if applicable (if the summary of risk selected is installer/supplier)


If you believe an Installer or Supplier has been involved in fraud, error, or non-compliance, please let us know. Select their name from the list provided of suppliers already linked to this award. If the Installer or Supplier is not listed, then use the Installer/Supplier lookup to find them in the system.

fields.name: Would_you_like_to_search_for_an_Installer_Instead
fields.fieldText: Would you like to search for an Installer Instead?

fields.name: Lookup_Installer_Suppliers_body
fields.fieldText: Please use the field below to search for the business account name of the Installer/Supplier, or leave the field below blank and click "Next" to display an entire list of suppliers held in the system that you can search.

fields.name: Supplier_Installer_Name
fields.helpText: Enter the installer/supplier name if cannot find from the list provided

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Confirmation_Message_Create
fields.fieldText:
Fraud Case Ref: {!flaLaIdentifier}


Your {!Case_Type} case has been created successfully and has been added to the funding award: {!Get_Award.Name}.

fields.name: ManualAddress_Title
fields.fieldText:
Address not listed - manually enter address


Manually enter the address if you cannot find it from the list of addresses provided

fields.name: Property_Address_Manually_Entered
fields.helpText: Property Address (Manually Entered) as details of the address could not be found

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Confirm_this_is_the_address_to_use
fields.fieldText: Confirm this is the address to use

fields.name: Address_Details_Display
fields.fieldText:
An address with this UPRN ({!Run_OS_Address_Lookup.varUPRN}) already exists in the system


{!Get_Address_Records.Street}

{!Get_Address_Records.City}

{!Get_Address_Records.State}

{!Get_Address_Records.PostalCode}

fields.name: Confirm_this_is_the_address_to_use
fields.fieldText: Confirm this is the address to use

fields.name: Fraud_and_Error_Case_Header
fields.fieldText:
Create Fraud or Error Record

{!Get_Award.Name}

fields.name: Edit_Fraud_and_Error_Case_Header
fields.fieldText:
Edit Fraud or Error Record

{!rcdUpdateFraud.LA_Identifier__c}

fields.name: Risks_and_Issues_Case_body
fields.fieldText:
Please enter details of any fraud, error or non-compliance related to this award. This information will help us monitor potential challenges and take appropriate actions to address them effectively.


  • ﻿Fraud: Intentionally making a false representation or failing to disclose relevant information, or the abuse of position, to make a gain or cause 
  • Error: Losses arising from unintentional events processing error and official / administrations errors
  • Non-Compliance: failure or refusal to act in accordance with a set of rules, regulations, or standards

Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required. Please ensure all required fields are completed before submitting the form.

validationRule.errorMessage: The Case Started Date should not exceed 2 weeks after today, or be more than 1 year before today.

fields.name: Loss_and_Actor_Details
fields.fieldText: Loss and who committed fraud, error or non-compliance

fields.name: Loss_Type
fields.helpText: Select reporting type from drop down

fields.name: Actor
fields.fieldText: Who committed fraud, error non-compliance (* Required)
fields.helpText: Please select who committed /caused the fraud, error and non-compliance

fields.name: Actor_Other
fields.fieldText: Who committed fraud, error non-compliance - Other (* Required)
fields.helpText: Enter text if relevant selection is not available

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Summary_Heading
fields.fieldText:
Create Fraud or Error Record

{!Get_Award.Name}

fields.name: Summary_Body
fields.fieldText:
Summary of Fraud and Error Record (Read Only)


The following details are a read only summary of the Fraud or Error Record

fields.name: Actor_Other_summary
fields.fieldText: Who committed fraud, error non-compliance - Other

screens.name: Summary_of_Fraud_and_Error_Edit
screens.label: Summary of Fraud and Error Edit

fields.name: Edit_Summary_Heading
fields.fieldText:
Edit Fraud or Error Record: {!rcdUpdateFraud.LA_Identifier__c}

{!Get_Award.Name}

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Summary_Body
fields.fieldText:
Summary of Edited Fraud and Error Record (Read Only)


The following details are a read only summary of the Fraud or Error record that has been edited

fields.name: Edit_Fraud_and_Error_Detail
fields.fieldText: Fraud and Error Detail (Before and after edit)

fields.name: Edit_Actor_before
fields.fieldText: Who committed fraud, error non-compliance (Before Edit)

fields.name: Edit_Actor_other_before
fields.fieldText: Who committed fraud, error non-compliance - Other (Before Edit)

fields.name: Edit_Actor_summary
fields.fieldText: Who committed fraud, error non-compliance (After Edit)

fields.name: Edit_Actor_Other_summary
fields.fieldText: Who committed fraud, error non-compliance - Other (After Edit)

fields.name: Edit_Risk_Category_Area_Details_summary
fields.fieldText: Risk & Category Area Details (Before and after edit)

fields.name: Category_of_Risk_Areas_Other_before
fields.fieldText: Category of Risk Areas - Other (Before Edit)

fields.name: Edit_Category_of_Risk_Areas_Other_summary
fields.fieldText: Category of Risk Areas - Other (After Edit)

fields.name: Edit_Property_Address_Details_summary
fields.fieldText: Property Address Details (Before and after edit)

fields.name: Edit_Installer_Supplier_Details_summary
fields.fieldText: Installer Supplier Details (Before and after edit)

fields.name: Edit_Value_of_Fraud_and_Error_summary
fields.fieldText: Value of Fraud and Error (Before and after edit)

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Closure_Outcome_and_Resolution_Details
fields.fieldText: Closure, Outcome and Resolution Details (Before and after edit)

fields.name: Fraud_and_Error_Value_Header
fields.fieldText:
Create Fraud or Error Record

{!Get_Award.Name}

fields.name: Edit_Value_Heading
fields.fieldText:
Edit Fraud or Error Record

{!rcdUpdateFraud.LA_Identifier__c}

fields.name: Fraud_and_Error_Value_body
fields.fieldText:
Value or estimated value of the fraud


Please enter details of the value or estimated value of the fraud, error or non-compliance (e.g. invoice amount, average cost of measure) related to this award. This information will help us monitor potential challenges and take appropriate actions to address them effectively.


Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required. Please ensure all required fields are completed before submitting the form.

fields.name: Value_Estimated_Prevented
fields.helpText:
Value or estimated value of the fraud/error/non compliance eg. invoice amount, average cost of measure.


Prevented: the value identified that was stopped by the controls ahead of any transferals of funds

validationRule.errorMessage: Estimated value must be between £0 and £10,000,000.

fields.name: Prevented_Actual_Estimate
fields.helpText:
Enter the value of fraud, error or non-compliance for the case, which can either be an actual or an estimate:


Actual – the value is known, e.g. amount disputing on the invoice


Estimate – where the amount is not known, and a credible estimate has been calculated, e.g. average cost of a measure.

fields.name: Value_Detected
fields.helpText: Detected: the value identified after transferals of funds

fields.name: Value_Recovered
fields.helpText: Recovered: the value that was recovered after detected

fields.name: Amount_Check_Text
fields.fieldText: You appeared to have entered an abnormally high or low number, could you please review before proceeding?
